creator: niclas.zeising@gmail.com
text:
x11-wm/scrotwm is out of date (again). I also noticed that the makefile contained a stale master_site and that the global configuration file is erased regardless of any changes in it.

Fix: Attached patch updates scrotwm to latest version, removes stale master_site and makes installation and deleteion of etc/scrotwm.conf dependent on wether it exists and if it contains changes, as to not overwrite user made changes. It also installes an example screenshot script into share/example/scrotwm/.
